title: Classic Star Wars Volume 1: In Deadly Pursuit
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Vol. 1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:CSWVol1-InDeadlyPursuit.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars Volume 1:
In Deadly Pursuit'' |writer=[[Archie Goodwin]] |penciller=[[Al Williamson]], [[Allen Nunis]], [[Monty Sheldon]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist=[[Steve Buccellato]], [[Matt Hollingsworth]] |cover artist=[[Al Williamson]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[June]] [[1994]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/45-043/Classic-Star-Wars-Vol-1-In-Deadly-Pursuit-TPB|text=Classic Star Wars, Vol. 1: In Deadly Pursuit TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=196 |isbn=1569711097 |isbn2= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] |series=''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' |issues=1 |preceded by= |followed by=''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 2: The Rebel Storm]]'' }} '''''Classic Star Wars Volume 1: In Deadly Pursuit''''' was the first trade paperback collection of issues from the ''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]]. ''In Deadly Pursuit'' collects ''Classic Star Wars'' issues 1-7. The text's first edition, published in [[June]] [[1994]], was released as simply '''''Classic Star Wars: Volume One''''', without the ''In Deadly Pursuit'' subtitle. ==Publisher's summary== ''From 1981 to 1984, comic-book greats Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson turned out a popular series of ''Star Wars'' newpaper ''[sic]'' strips. Featuring the adventures of Luke, Leia, and Han in the time between the first and second movies, these strips were science-fiction adventure at its best.'' ''Dark Horse reformatted those strips to make them work as a continuous story in a series of comic books, with Al Williamson himself redrawing and extending many panels for the new format. This book collects the first seven issues of the popular Dark Horse comic, with a new introduction from Archie Goodwin, new cover art, and never-before-seen art from the sketchbooks of Al Williamson.'' ==Contents== *[[Classic Star Wars 1|''Classic Star Wars'' 1]] *[[Classic Star Wars 2|''Classic Star Wars'' 2]] *[[Classic Star Wars 3|''Classic Star Wars'' 3]] *[[Classic Star Wars 4|''Classic Star Wars'' 4]] *[[Classic Star Wars 5|''Classic Star Wars'' 5]] *[[Classic Star Wars 6|''Classic Star Wars'' 6]] *[[Classic Star Wars 7|''Classic Star Wars'' 7]] ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:CSWVol1-InDeadlyPursuit.png|Cover File:CSWv1-FC.png|Cover art ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/45-043/Classic-Star-Wars-Vol-1-In-Deadly-Pursuit-TPB|text=Classic Star Wars, Vol. 1: In Deadly Pursuit TPB}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები, ტომი 1: სასიკვდილო დევნა |nl=Classic Star Wars Volume 1: In Deadly Pursuit }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars trade paperbacks]]
